evals.prompt: What does /research do BEFORE extracting quotes from a video URL?
evals.expected_output: Invokes /transcribe-video first to capture a verbatim transcript; aggregator articles are not used as quote source
expectations: Mentions /transcribe-video as the first step for video URLs
Mentions aggregators do not source quotes

evals.prompt: When are aggregator articles allowed in /research output?
evals.expected_output: They can inform structure (which topics matter) but never source verbatim quotes — those must come from primary transcripts
expectations: Mentions aggregators do not source quotes verbatim
Mentions primary or verbatim source for quotes

evals.prompt: What's the default platform mix for /research?
evals.expected_output: X-first, then web. Voice-driven (top voices in vault registry).
expectations: Mentions X-first or X as default

evals.prompt: How are findings source-tagged after /research runs against a video URL?
evals.expected_output: Findings cite '[primary — verbatim]' not '[paraphrase]' or '[aggregator]', and quotes must grep into the _transcript-verbatim.md file
expectations: Mentions primary or verbatim source tag
Mentions quotes must come from transcript or grep into verbatim file

evals.prompt: What should /research do when git pull --rebase fails with a conflict during the commit step?
evals.expected_output: Run git rebase --abort immediately. Log partial if the report file was written to disk, fail if no report was produced. Use commit:conflict in the log line.
expectations: SKILL.md mentions partial if report written to disk
